articles.title: Oil and gas prices rapidly rise as Iran war shows no signs of letting up
articles.description:
Oil prices surpassed $90 a barrel Friday, with American crude settling at $90.90, up 36% from a week ago.

The post Oil and gas prices rapidly rise as Iran war shows no signs of letting up appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Oil prices exceeded $90 a barrel, impacting local gas prices for Boston residents.
American crude rose 36% in just one week, affecting transportation costs.
Rising fuel costs may lead to increased prices for goods and services in Boston.

articles.title: The Latest: Iran accused of attacks in UAE and Bahrain, smoke blankets Tehran from Israeli strikes
articles.description:
An Israeli attack on oil storage sites in Tehran sent up pillars of fire that could be seen in Associated Press video as a glow against the Saturday night sky.

The post The Latest: Iran accused of attacks in UAE and Bahrain, smoke blankets Tehran from Israeli strikes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Israeli airstrikes on Tehran oil sites caused visible fires Saturday night.
Iran accused of launching attacks in UAE and Bahrain amid rising tensions.
Boston residents may face increased gas prices due to Middle East oil supply disruptions.

articles.title: Trump encourages Latin American leaders to use military action to help US fight cartels
articles.description:
“The only way to defeat these enemies is by unleashing the power of our militaries," Trump said.

summary: Trump advocates for military action against cartels, urging Latin American leaders to collaborate.

Increased military involvement may lead to heightened tensions and security concerns in the region.

articles.title: Ford recalls 1.74 million of its cars over rearview display issues
articles.description:
The recalls cover 849,310 Broncos and Edges as well as 889,950 Escapes, Corsairs, Aviators and Explorers.

The post Ford recalls 1.74 million of its cars over rearview display issues appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ford recalls 1.74 million vehicles due to rearview display issues affecting safety.
849,310 Broncos and Edges, plus 889,950 Escapes and Explorers are included in the recall.
Boston residents owning these models should check for potential safety risks and recall notifications.

articles.title: Families with missing loved ones like Nancy Guthrie face ambiguous loss. It freezes grief.
articles.description:
“There's no clear resolution from it. We know from research that ambiguous loss is the most psychologically painful kind of loss because of that.”

The post Families with missing loved ones like Nancy Guthrie face ambiguous loss. It freezes grief. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Families in Boston face unresolved grief due to missing loved ones like Nancy Guthrie.
Research indicates ambiguous loss is the most psychologically painful type of loss.
Local support systems are crucial for families dealing with this prolonged grief.
